description.en: Open-source text-to-audio generation using Stability AI's Stable Audio Open model via ComfyUI
description.de: Open-Source Text-zu-Audio-Generierung mit Stability AI's Stable Audio Open Modell via ComfyUI

meta.quality_note: Experimental quality - lower than ACE Step. Good for short sound effects and ambient audio.
meta.notes: Stable Audio Open 1.0 via ComfyUI. Text-to-audio generation for sound effects and ambient audio. Max 47 seconds output. Download model from Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/stabilityai/stable-audio-open-1.0
meta.fair_culture: 7,300h CC-licensed audio (Freesound + FMA), full attribution published

known_biases.en: T5-Base text encoder is English-only (768d) — non-English prompts poorly understood
known_biases.de: T5-Base Textencoder ist nur englischsprachig (768d) — nicht-englische Prompts schlecht verstanden

known_biases.en: Freesound skews toward Western sound recording practices and environments
known_biases.de: Freesound tendiert zu westlichen Tonaufnahmepraktiken und -umgebungen

known_biases.en: FMA skews toward Western independent/electronic music

known_gaps.en: Non-Western instruments and vocal traditions are rare in training data
known_gaps.de: Nicht-westliche Instrumente und Vokaltraditionen sind selten in den Trainingsdaten

known_gaps.en: CC license means creators consented to sharing, but not necessarily to AI training
known_gaps.de: CC-Lizenz bedeutet Zustimmung zum Teilen, aber nicht unbedingt zum KI-Training

known_gaps.en: Full attribution list published — this is the most transparent model in our system
known_gaps.de: Vollständige Attributionsliste veröffentlicht — das transparenteste Modell in unserem System
